meta.title: Shaper: Data Shaper (smoothing_30s)
description: Shaper: Data Shaper (smoothing_30s) replays live-power input through the current shaper rather than solar-divert control.
Short smoothing window. The shaped limit should react more quickly to live power changes.
Compare live power, smoothed live power, shaper maximum, available charge power, and actual charge power to see how the limiter reacts.
